channel.title: GitHub Vue Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: moeru-ai/airi
item.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

item.title: frappe/lms
item.description: Easy to Use, 100% Open Source Learning Management System

item.title: zxwk1998/vue-admin-better
item.description: 🎉 vue admin,vue3 admin,vue3.0 admin,vue后台管理,vue-admin,vue3.0-admin,admin,vue-admin,vue-element-admin,ant-design,vab admin pro,vab admin plus,vue admin plus,vue admin pro

item.title: iAJue/MoeKoeMusic
item.description: 一款开源简洁高颜值的酷狗第三方客户端 An open-source, concise, and aesthetically pleasing third-party client for KuGou that supports Windows / macOS / Linux / Web

item.title: un-pany/v3-admin-vite
item.description: ☀️ A crafted Vue3 admin template | Vue Admin | Vue Template | Vue3 Admin | Vue3 Template | Vue 后台 | Vue 模板 | Vue3 后台 | Vue3 模板

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: ccbikai/Sink
item.description: ⚡ A Simple / Speedy / Secure Link Shortener with Analytics, 100% run on Cloudflare.

item.title: GiovanH/unofficial-homestuck-collection
item.description: An offline collection of Homestuck and its related works.

item.title: wyeeeee/hajimi
item.description: 这是一个基于 FastAPI 构建的 Gemini API 代理

item.title: scalar/scalar
item.description: Scalar is an open-source API platform:　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　🌐 Modern Rest API Client　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　📖 Beautiful API References　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　✨ 1st-Class OpenAPI/Swagger Support

item.title: AutomaApp/automa
item.description: A browser extension for automating your browser by connecting blocks

item.title: hslr-s/sun-panel
item.description: A server, NAS navigation panel, Homepage, browser homepage. | 一个服务器、NAS导航面板、Homepage、浏览器首页。

item.title: doocs/md
item.description: ✍ WeChat Markdown Editor | 一款高度简洁的微信 Markdown 编辑器：支持 Markdown 语法、自定义主题样式、内容管理、多图床、AI 助手等特性

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: The Intuitive Vue UI Library powered by Reka UI & Tailwind CSS.
